name: Antony Waste Handling Cell Limited
summary: Antony Waste Handling Cell Limited engages in municipal solid waste (MSW) management business in India. It provides MSW services, including solid waste collection, transportation, processing, and disposal services primarily to municipalities. The company is also involved in the landfill construction and management sector; and waste management area. Antony Waste Handling Cell Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Thane, India.
